pertanyaan:
Budi: "Excuse me, Ma'am. I am terribly sorry. I accidentally knocked over the vase while cleaning the table."
Teacher: "Oh, I see. It’s alright, Budi. Thank you for being honest and telling me right away."
Budi: "It won’t happen again, Ma'am. Thank you for your kindness."

What does Budi say to express his regret?

“Good morning, everyone. Allow me to introduce myself. My name is Kevin Pratama. You can call me Kevin. I just moved here because my father was assigned to work at the Bondowoso District Office. I hope we can be good friends."

Why did Kevin move to Bondowoso?
pilihan: Because he wants to study in Bondowoso.
Because his father has a job in Bondowoso.
Because he wants to meet new friends.

pertanyaan: Which of the following is the correct response for the students to welcome Kevin?

Guide: "It departs at a quarter to midnight so you can reach the crater before sunrise."

What time does the bus leave?

pilihan: It’s ten past ten in the morning.
It’s ten to ten in the morning.

pertanyaan:

Bondowoso is famous for its 'Tape'. Mr. Dono ... fermented cassava every morning to be sold at the local market.

Text for questions 7-10

Bondowoso is often called the "Megalithic City" because it has thousands of ancient stones spread across several districts like Wringin and Grujugan. One of the most famous types is the Sarkofagus or stone coffin. These stones are very large and heavy. They were carved by humans thousands of years ago during the prehistoric era. Today, many tourists visit Bondowoso to see these unique historical heritages. The local government protects these sites to preserve the history of our ancestors.

What is the main topic of the text?
pilihan: The historical and cultural significance of megalithic sites in Bondowoso.
The process of building modern sarcophagi in East Java.
The tourism industry in the Wringin and Grujugan districts..

pertanyaan: Why is Bondowoso called the "Megalithic City"?
pilihan: Because it has many modern buildings.
Because it has thousands of ancient stones.
Because it is located near a volcano.
Because the people are very friendly.

pertanyaan: Where can we find many megalithic stones in Bondowoso according to the text?
pilihan: At the top of Mount Raung.

pertanyaan: "The presence of these monuments provides invaluable insights..." (Second paragraph). The word "invaluable" has the same meaning as ….

pilihan: On the left side of the road.

Text for questions 17-20

Last Sunday, my friends and I went to Kawah Wurung in Bondowoso. We left home at 7 AM by motorcycle. The road was a bit steep, but the view of the green hills was amazing. It looked like the "Teletubbies Hill". When we arrived, we took many pictures. We also sat on the grass and enjoyed the fresh air.

When did the writer go to Kawah Wurung?

pilihan: Because the sun was too hot.

300g of Bondowoso Tape, 100g of flour, 1 tablespoon of sugar, A pinch of salt, Water, Cooking oil.

Text for questions 32-35

The Legend of Beto So’on
Long ago in the Solor district of Bondowoso, there was a unique site called Beto So’on, which means "piled stones". People believed that a powerful man with supernatural strength lived in the area. He wanted to build a great monument in just one night.

What does "Beto So'on" mean in the local language?
Who was believed to have built the monument?
pilihan: A powerful man with supernatural strength.

pertanyaan: Why couldn't the man finish his work?
pilihan: Because the sun began to rise.
Because the stones were too heavy.

pertanyaan: What is the moral value of the story?
pilihan: We must work hard even if we are tired.
Supernatural powers are the most important thing.
Some mysteries are part of our cultural heritage.

pertanyaan: The Gerbong Maut monument ... by many students every year to learn about history.
The fermented cassava (Tape) ... into many different snacks by creative people in Bondowoso.

Text for questions 42-45

A smartphone is a sophisticated mobile device that functions as a high-end personal computer integrated into a cellular phone. Most modern smartphones are equipped with processors that have 4 to 8 cores, enabling them to process millions of instructions per second.

What is the primary function of the 4 to 8 cores in a smartphone's processor?
pilihan: To increase the storage capacity of the device.
To connect the smartphone to a landline phone.
To improve the quality of the digital camera.
To allow the device to process millions of instructions per second

pertanyaan: What does the text say about the current role of smartphones in human daily activities?
pilihan: They are only used for making emergency calls.
They support nearly 80% of daily digital activities worldwide.
They have replaced the need for high-speed internet.
They are primarily used as a replacement for high-definition televisions.

pertanyaan: Why are smartphones considered sophisticated mobile devices?
pilihan: Because they can only function using 5G networks.
Because they have very large physical sizes like computers.
Because they integrate personal computer functions with cellular phones.
Because they do not require batteries to operate complex tasks.

pertanyaan: What is the benefit of having 4G LTE or 5G networks connectivity on a smartphone?
pilihan: It provides high-speed data download for seamless communication.
It increases the physical pixel density of the touchscreen.
It allows the device to store up to 1 TB of internal data.
It prevents the lithium-ion battery from running out of power.
